vehicle.model_designation_position: right side of front grille (from viewer perspective)

composition.important_crop_information: leftmost rear wheels are slightly cropped, all main cab and front features are within frame

company_identity.position: across roof light bar (horizontal, yellow letters)
right side of cab, behind door (large vertical red letters, angled, partially cropped)
company_identity.appearance: very large, bold, partially overlapping yellow stripe

company_identity.position: lower right cab, above side skirt near fuel tank (horizontal)

owner_signatures.position: front center, above grille (horizontal, red letters)
upper right cab, above yellow WTS (small, cursive yellow text)

roof_lights.position: left and right ends of roof bar (above windshield)

grille_lights.position: in grille, below VOLVO text, above main grille cutout
grille_lights.arrangement: horizontal row, left and right sides

bumper_lights.position: outer left and right edges of lower bumper

main_headlights.outer_shape: angled vertical housing, integrated with DRL

front_geometry.grille_description: main grille with rectangular mesh pattern, 4 horizontal solid bars, Volvo roundel in center
front_geometry.headlight_description: vertically stacked, angled, with integrated LED daytime running lights in L-shape
front_geometry.bumper_description: painted to match cab, large and angular, yellow accent stripes, integrated fog/auxiliary lights
